description: An IT auditor reviews the security and controls of the automated CI/CD pipeline.

nodes.task_description: Review the pipeline configuration to ensure that all code is scanned for vulnerabilities (SAST) before it can be merged.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor confirms that a static code analysis tool is an integrated and required step in the pipeline.

nodes.task_description: Verify that deployments to the production environment require a manual approval from a senior manager and cannot be done automatically.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor confirms there is a manual approval gate for production deployments.

nodes.task_description: Review the access permissions to the pipeline tool itself to ensure that developers cannot approve their own code changes into production.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor confirms that segregation of duties is enforced within the pipeline's permissions.
